class.name: BloomShader
class.brief_description: Post-process effect class that implements HDR Bloom based on the [url=https://learnopengl.com/Guest-Articles/2022/Phys.-Based-Bloom]LearnOpenGL article[/url]
class.description: Post-process effect class that implements HDR Bloom based on the [url=https://learnopengl.com/Guest-Articles/2022/Phys.-Based-Bloom]LearnOpenGL article[/url] It is a multi-pass effect: Downsample Pass, Upsample Pass, Composite Pass. The effect is controlled by the 3 member variables: [b]Threshold[/b], [b]Radius[/b] and [b]Strength[/b].
class.members:
<member name="m_threshold" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="1.0"> Controls the threshold variable of the effect.
<member name="m_radius" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="2.5"> Controls the radius variable of the effect.
<member name="m_strength" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.5"> Controls the strength variable of the effect.
